sources.name: 全国地方公共団体コード
sources.publisher: 総務省 (Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications)

sources.name: Municipal tourism pages
sources.note: robots.txt is read on every domain. See DATA_POLICY.md.

coverage.note: Official code list includes ~197 政令指定都市の行政区 (designated-city wards) which are not counted in the public 1,741 figure.

schedule.monthly_cycle: Each municipality re-scraped at most once per 30 days
schedule.daily_batch: GitHub Actions cron at 03:00 JST processes the 58 stalest municipalities
schedule.rate_limit: 5 seconds minimum between requests to the same domain (steady-state); pilot uses 2s for initial coverage

data_freshness_promise: No record left stale beyond 30 days under steady-state operation.
